characters.name: Elena
characters.description: Warm program guide who introduces founders to the course

voiceProfile.defaultInstruction: warm and welcoming, clear and professional

characters.name: Carlos
characters.description: Experienced founder who expanded from Latin America to the U.S.

dialogue.text: Welcome to the UCF Business Incubation Program. I am Elena, and I will be your guide through this course.
And I am Carlos. I went through this process myself, expanding my business from Latin America to Florida. Trust me, knowing what to expect makes all the difference.
This program covers the legal, financial, and cultural realities of running a business in the United States. Think of it as a road trip through Central Florida's business landscape.
Most founders assume the hard part is paperwork. But the real challenge is knowing what you do not know. That is why we say: learn first, then decide.
Every module is built around four themes: reduce risk, watch your money, avoid common mistakes, and understand U.S. business culture.
dialogue.instruction: clear and structured, slight emphasis on each theme

dialogue.text: These are not just theory. I made some of these mistakes myself. Skipping any one of these areas creates problems that show up later, usually at a higher cost.
The course is self-paced, with no deadlines or exams. You can complete modules in any order. Ready to explore?
Let us get started. By the end, you will know whether U.S. expansion is the right move for your business.
